ip_outcome_note: IP already verified as Nicol Bolas (Wave 189, Edgelord-attached). Triviabot treated as resolved baseline; no re-verification needed.

trivia_bullets.text: War of the Spark (WAR, May 2019) is the climax of Nicol Bolas's plan: using the Amonkhet block's trials to build an undead elite army (the Dreadhorde/Eternals), then opening a Planar Bridge to unleash them on Ravnica. Honor the God-Pharaoh depicts the Eternals performing their programmed devotional salute while Ravnica burns around them.

"In life, they revered a diverse pantheon of gods. Now they revere only the God-Pharaoh." The God-Pharaoh is Nicol Bolas's Amonkhet title. The flavor text is a two-sentence theological dispossession: pre-existing Amonkhet faith stripped and replaced with singular worship of Bolas.

Amass was the one new keyword in WAR, mechanically representing Bolas's ever-growing zombie horde. The Wizards mechanics article describes it as 'on the side of evil,' color-coded to Bolas's Grixis palette (blue, black, red). Honor the God-Pharaoh pairs Amass 1 with looting (discard + draw 2) at {2}{R}.

The Eternals performing the salute are not named individual characters; they are the Dreadhorde — a mass undead army created from Amonkhet's dead champions who completed the trials of the five gods before Bolas embalmed and reanimated them. The card is linked to the nicol-bolas character node in this archive.

EDHREC rank 14,180; sees play in Zombie Army/Amass tribal Commander lists and Pauper red-black looting builds. The discard-to-draw cost makes it card-neutral (minus the Amass token generated), giving marginal efficiency at common. Legal in Pioneer, Modern, Legacy, Vintage, Pauper, and Commander.
